gtalike_teleport.config.title: Grand Teleport Settings
gtalike_teleport.config.description: Adjust camera heights used by the zoom stages.
gtalike_teleport.config.linked.tooltip: Use the same three heights for zoom-out and zoom-in.
gtalike_teleport.config.unlinked.tooltip: Edit zoom-out and zoom-in heights separately.
gtalike_teleport.config.layout_debug.too: Drag each layout item to move it. Drag the right edge, bottom edge, or corner to resize it.
gtalike_teleport.config.layout_aspect.to: Keep the selected item aspect ratio when resizing from the corner.
gtalike_teleport.config.layout_size_rese: Restore the selected item size and aspect ratio while keeping its position as much as possible.
gtalike_teleport.config.layout_values.to: Enter relative x y w h values and apply them to the selected item.
gtalike_teleport.config.layout_grid.tool: Show layout grid guides and center lines while editing the layout.
gtalike_teleport.config.layout_snap.tool: Snap dragged items to the grid, center lines, and other item edges.
gtalike_teleport.config.layout_debug_hin: Layout edit: drag items to move / drag edges to resize / edit selected text in the text box
